acquisition method: operating in data-dependent MS to MS/MS switching mode
alkylation reagent: alkylation was achieved using 25 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation was achieved using 25 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digestion took place overnight at 25 °C using trypsin/Lys-C mix (1:20 enzyme:substrate)
enrichment method: Enrichment of the human liver mitochondrial lysate using size-exclusion chromatography
fractionation method: Enrichment of the human liver mitochondrial lysate using size-exclusion chromatography
fragmentation method: operating in data-dependent MS to MS/MS switching mode with collision-induced dissociation mode
instrument: LC-MS/MS was performed using a Thermo Scientific Fusion Lumos mass spectrometry system
labeling: LC-MS/MS was also used to confirm the presence of these proteins in the samples that were used.
reduction reagent: DTT was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
reduction concentration: DTT was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
